title: Fix findFirst() off-by-one without breaking findLast() / findIndex()
prompt:
There is a bug in src/list-helpers.ts: `findFirst()` never visits the last element of the array (off-by-one). The failing tests in tests/target.test.ts pin the correct behavior — they exercise matches at the final index and verify the predicate is called for every index 0..length-1.

Fix the bug so tests/target.test.ts passes. The tests in tests/regression.test.ts cover `findLast()` and `findIndex()` and must continue to pass — they include cases that match at index boundaries, so a sloppy fix that adjusts the shared internal scanner's loop bounds will break them.

Read the contract on `_iterate` carefully: it expects an inclusive [from, to] range. The bug is at the *call site* of `_iterate` inside `findFirst`, not inside `_iterate` itself. Make the minimal correct change.

Do not modify any test files. Do not add new files. Confine the change to src/list-helpers.ts.
